title: Master Index Blueprint (Part 1)
normalized_content:
Phase 0.5A – Master Index Blueprint (Part 1)
Organization: Aetheris BioPharma Private Limited
Scope: Enterprise document repository index – Part 1 (QMS, SOPs, Policies, Forms, WI,
Templates, Validation overview)
Date: 2026-07-11
Version: R0
This document defines the logical structure and metadata for the Aetheris BioPharma
document universe. It is consistent with Phases 0.1–0.4 (organization blueprint, QMS,
operational records, historical knowledge, and incoming quality event).
All entries follow Aetheris numbering conventions and reference existing sites, products,
equipment, employees, and SOPs.
1. Repository Structure (Logical)
docs/
-Organization/
├── 00
-QMS/
├── 01
-SOPs/
├── 02
-Forms/
├── 03
-Policies/
├── 04
-Equipment/
├── 05
-Products/
├── 06
-Suppliers/
├── 07
-Training/
├── 08
-Calibration/
├── 09
-Maintenance/
├── 10
-Batch-Records/
├── 11
-Environmental-Monitoring/
├── 12
-Validation/
├── 13
-Change-Control/
├── 14
-Risk-Assessments/
├── 15
-Audit-Reports/
├── 16
-Complaints/
├── 17
-Historical-Investigations/
├── 18
-Historical-CAPAs/
├── 19
-Management-Review/
├── 20
-Product-Quality-Review/
├── 21
-Master-Indexes/
└── 99

In Helix, this is represented as logical organization via metadata, not just physical folders.
2. Numbering Conventions (Recap)
● Sites: PASH, VISK, CORP
● SOPs: [Site]-[Area]-SOP-[AreaCode]-[Seq]-[Rev]
● Forms: [Site]-[Dept]-FRM-[Seq]-[Rev]
● Policies: [Site]-[Dept]-POL-[Seq]-[Rev]
● Work Instructions: [Site]-[Area]-WI-[AreaCode]-[Seq]-[Rev]
● Templates: [Site]-[Dept]-TMP-[Seq]-[Rev]
● Validation: [Site]-VAL-[Type]-[YYYY]-[Seq]
● Training: [Site]-TRN-[YYYY]-[Seq]
● Calibration: [Site]-CAL-[YYYY]-[Seq]
● Maintenance: [Site]-MNT-[YYYY]-[Seq]
● Batch Records: [Site]-BMR-[ProductCode]-[YYMM]-[Seq]
● EM Records: [Site]-EM-[YYYY]-[Seq]
● Supplier Docs: SUPC-[SupplierID]-[YYYY]-[Seq]
● Change Control: [Site]-CC-[YYYY]-[Seq]
● Risk Assessments: [Site]-RA-[Area]-[YYYY]-[Seq]
● PQR: [Site]-PQR-[ProductCode]-[YYYY]-[Seq]
● Management Review: [Site]-MR-[YYYY]-[Seq]
● Audit Reports / Findings: [Site]-QA-RPT-[YYYY]-[Seq]-R0 / [Site]-AF-
[YYYY]-[Seq]
● Complaints: [Site]-CMP-[YYYY]-[Seq]
● Deviations: [Site]-DEV-[YYYY]-[Seq]
● CAPA: [Site]-CAPA-[YYYY]-[Seq]

● Detailed SOPs: ~60 (full text in Phase 0.5B)
● Indexed SOPs: ~240 (metadata only)
